# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  parameters:
    storageAccountName: '<storageAccountName>'
    location: '<location>'
    websiteContainerName: '<websiteContainerName>'
    staticWebsiteHosting: true

  variables:
    resourceGroup: '[resourceGroup().name]'
    storageAccountKind: 'StorageV2'

  resources:
    resources:
      - type: Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups
        apiVersion: 2019-10-01
        name: ${{ parameters.storageAccountName }}
        location: ${{ parameters.location }}
        properties: {}

    - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      apiVersion: 2019-06-01
      name: ${{ parameters.storageAccountName }}
      kind: ${{ variables.storageAccountKind }}
      location: ${{ parameters.location }}
      properties:
        accountType: Standard_LRS
        accountTier: Standard
        creationTimestamp: $(utcnow)
        enabledForBlobProxy: true
        enableHttpsTrafficOnly: true
        minScaleUnits: 2
        networkAcls: {}
        supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
        allowBlobPublicAccess: 'Enabled'
        publicNetworkAccess: Container
        resourceGroup: ${{ variables.resourceGroup }}

    - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
      apiVersion: 2019-06-01
      name:
        accountName: ${{ parameters.storageAccountName }}
        blobServiceName: default
        containerName: ${{ parameters.websiteContainerName }}
      properties:
        publicAccessLevel: Blob

    - type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
      apiVersion: 2019-08-01
      name: ${{ parameters.storageAccountName }}WebAppSites
      location: ${{ parameters.location }}
      properties:
        serverFarmId: /subscriptions/${SubscriptionId}/resourceGroups/${{ variables.resourceGroup }}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
        siteConfig:
          appSettings: []
          linuxFxVersion: DOCKER|mcr.microsoft.com/azure-php/7.4-fpm
          scmType: None
        hostedZone: null
        siteMetadata: {}

    - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01-preview
      name: ${{ parameters.storageAccountName }}website
      location: ${{ parameters.location }}
      properties:
        serverFarmId: /subscriptions/${SubscriptionId}/resourceGroups/${{ variables.resourceGroup }}/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/${{ parameters.storageAccountName }}WebAppSites
        hostName: ${{ parameters.storageAccountName }}.z5.web.core.windows.net
        siteConfig:
          appSettings: []
          linuxFxVersion: DOCKER|mcr.microsoft.com/azure-php/7.4-fpm
          alwaysOn: true
          clientAffinityEnabled: false
          dotNetVersion: 'CORE'
          enableGZip: false
          ftpsState: Disabled
          http20Enabled: false
          use32BitWorkerProcess: false
          javaVersion: 8
          phpVersion: 7.4
          scmType: None
          requestTracing: Off
        hostNameSslStates: []
